pr.title: Non-record: 11L PartialRoPE + LNScale + EMA + SWA + TTT (1xH100 107min, val_bpb=1.2207, 15.4MB)

output.summary: 11L GPT uses PartialRoPE/LNScale, SmearGate and U-Net skips with BigramHash, muon+Adam with EMA/SWA, uniform int5 quant, sliding-window eval plus SGD TTT.
techniques: PartialRoPE with LNScale, SmearGate, and learnable U-Net skip connections
Muon optimizer + Adam for scalars with EMA and SWA
Uniform int5 quantization paired with sliding-window eval and SGD test-time training
